chapter_title.en: Chapter on Refraining From Testimony, What Has Been Mentioned About Establishing it, Emphasizing it, and Concealing it

text: 3326 - رُوِيَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ اَلْعَبْدُ اَلصَّالِحُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ يَنْبَغِي لِلَّذِي يُدْعَى إِلَى شَهَادَةٍ أَنْ يَتَقَاعَسَ عَنْهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3326 - It is narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl who said that the Righteous Servant, peace be upon him, said: "One who is called to bear witness should not refrain from it."
